personal_info.name: Mrunal Nivrutti Tambe
personal_info.title: Full Stack Web Developer | MERN Stack Developer | AI & LLM Engineer
personal_info.tagline: Building scalable full-stack and AI-powered applications using MERN, FastAPI, LangChain, and modern cloud technologies.

about_section.summary: Computer Engineering undergraduate with strong expertise in the MERN stack, scalable backend systems, AI-powered applications, and LLM engineering. Experienced in building secure REST APIs, integrating FastAPI microservices, and developing intelligent applications using LangChain, LangGraph, and Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG). Strong foundation in Data Structures & Algorithms with experience in hackathons, real-time systems, and full-stack product development.
